0.q: ROS generated during salt stress gets converted into H2O2 by SOD and its optimum level was maintained by APX

Among enzymes involved in ROS production and scavenging, superoxide dismutase (SOD) plays a crucial role, as its enzymatic action results in the formation of H2O2 which is then detoxified into water and oxygen by ascorbate peroxidase (APX).

1.q: Cellulose content was 1.6–2 folds significantly higher in PaSOD and dual transgenic lines... as compared to WT plants under stress conditions.
